steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3102 in isolated session
steps.expected: Navbar, token header, chart, stats, swap widget, transactions, and token info render with dark theme
steps.observed: All core sections rendered in one load; dark theme and Cash green accents visible across the page
Screenshot shows all required sections present without white-screen failure

evidence.consoleErrors: No uncaught JavaScript exceptions observed during this flow.
evidence.network: GET /market, GET /candles?interval=1h, GET /depth observed from localhost:3100

assertions.title: Token header with price and change

steps.action: Inspect token header content after page load
steps.expected: Header shows CASH icon, name, ticker, current price, and 24h change with color indicator
steps.observed: Header shows icon + CASH + $CASH + price + green positive change when not hovering chart

steps.action: Check price/change typography and color via DOM styles
steps.expected: Price rendered in monospace and change color reflects sign
steps.observed: Price and change use GeistMono; positive change rendered green (rgb(0, 213, 75))

evidence.consoleErrors: No uncaught JavaScript exceptions observed during header checks.
evidence.network: GET /market used for live price/market values

steps.action: Load chart panel on default 1D range
steps.expected: Visible line chart with non-empty data
steps.observed: Chart rendered with visible line and axes in chart area

steps.expected: Positive trend uses green line and gradient fill
steps.observed: Chart displayed green line with green gradient fill below line

evidence.consoleErrors: No uncaught JavaScript exceptions observed while chart rendered.
evidence.network: GET /candles?interval=1h and market polling requests observed

steps.action: Move pointer over chart plotting area
steps.expected: Crosshair/tooltip appears and hover timestamp/price are shown
steps.observed: Crosshair and hover marker appeared with tooltip labels on chart

steps.action: Compare header value before and during hover
steps.expected: Header updates to hovered data point
steps.observed: Header price changed from $0.000000 baseline to hovered value ($0.267637) with timestamp

evidence.consoleErrors: No uncaught JavaScript exceptions observed during hover interaction.
evidence.network: No additional request required; interaction is client-side on rendered chart data

assertions.title: Framer Motion animations

steps.observed: Animated switch observed between swap and limit tab states

steps.action: Use swap direction toggle and token modal
steps.expected: Direction button rotates and modal enters with animated transition
steps.observed: Direction toggle transition and modal open/close animation observed
No incoming trade rows during test window; slide-in animation could not be exercised

evidence.consoleErrors: No uncaught JavaScript exceptions observed during animation interactions.
evidence.network: No trade stream events observed in this isolated window

assertions.issues: Blocked on validating 'new transactions slide into table' because no live transactions arrived during the test run.

steps.action: Apply isolated session route abort for localhost:3101 and reload
steps.expected: UI remains stable while real-time channel is unavailable
steps.observed: Page remained fully interactive; no crash/blank screen after reload under ws-block condition

steps.action: Check browser error/console output after reload
steps.observed: No uncaught JS exceptions; console contained repeated HTTP 429 resource errors from localhost:3100 endpoints

evidence.consoleErrors: No uncaught JavaScript exceptions. Console contained repeated 'Failed to load resource: 429 (Too Many Requests)' from API calls.
evidence.network: Session network log showed API polling requests; ws request capture unavailable in this tool output, but ws endpoint was route-blocked for this session

frictions.description: Console repeatedly logged HTTP 429 responses from localhost:3100 during validation windows.
frictions.resolution: Continued assertions using visual/runtime checks; no uncaught JS exceptions or UI crashes were introduced by these responses.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request output did not explicitly list websocket handshake records for ws://localhost:3101.
frictions.resolution: Used isolated route blocking on localhost:3101 plus reload/console checks and visual stability confirmation to validate graceful degradation behavior.

blockers.description: No incoming trades during test window, preventing direct verification of 'new transactions slide into table' animation behavior.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded page and waited through interaction cycles; transactions table remained in empty-state.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions: 5 passed and 1 blocked (VAL-POLISH-006 could not fully validate new-transaction slide animation due no live trade events).
